description: Balanced sustainable resilience across resilience ecology inclusion economy governance adaptation constraints and implementation burden.
Prioritizes system function under disturbance recovery and continuity.
Prioritizes ecological integrity biodiversity water soil climate and ecosystem function.
Prioritizes social inclusion equity vulnerability reduction and justice.
Prioritizes institutions public capacity coordination accountability and implementation legitimacy.
Prioritizes learning adaptive capacity scenario planning and transformation.
Penalizes resource pressure and ecological overshoot risk more strongly.
Penalizes implementation burden when capacity finance or governance bandwidth is constrained.
